widgets_values:
Haute couture floral fantasy editorial, live-action luxury beauty campaign, motion-control orbital camera choreography, cinematic NOT casual video. 8K UHD, 60 fps, silky mechanical precision.

Medium close-up, continuous 360-degree slow orbit around a female muse standing in a dark studio filled with towering floral installations — peonies, orchids, dried pampas, and crystal vases arranged in symmetrical art-direction. She wears an ivory lace couture gown and an elaborate baroque pearl-and-gold floral crown, fresh blossoms woven into the structure above her temples. The camera executes a flawless robotic-arm arc at chest height, passing through layers of volumetric smoke and god-rays from a single overhead spotlight at 3200K warm tungsten. Petals tremble faintly in the camera's wake; skin remains soft, natural, luminous — no oily shine, no over-sharpening. Dreamlike romance, obsessive set design, fashion-magazine hero portrait in motion.

No subtitles, no background music, no visual clipping or drifting, consistent lighting throughout, zero watermarks, logos, or titles.
